name: zolta/forge
description: Domain layer foundation for PHP 8.2+ providing Value Objects with attribute-based validation, Entities, Aggregates, Rules, Specifications, Policies, Invariants, Transformers, and a framework-agnostic adapter system.

scripts.test:unit: APP_SERVICES_CACHE=/tmp/forge-services.php APP_PACKAGES_CACHE=/tmp/forge-packages.php APP_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/forge-config.php APP_ROUTES_CACHE=/tmp/forge-routes.php APP_EVENTS_CACHE=/tmp/forge-events.php PHPUNIT_RESULT_CACHE=/tmp/forge-phpunit.result.cache phpunit -c phpunit.xml --testsuite Unit
scripts.test:integration: APP_SERVICES_CACHE=/tmp/forge-services.php APP_PACKAGES_CACHE=/tmp/forge-packages.php APP_CONFIG_CACHE=/tmp/forge-config.php APP_ROUTES_CACHE=/tmp/forge-routes.php APP_EVENTS_CACHE=/tmp/forge-events.php PHPUNIT_RESULT_CACHE=/tmp/forge-phpunit.result.cache phpunit -c phpunit.xml --testsuite Integration
scripts.md: HOME=/tmp PDEPEND_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/pdepend-cache vendor/bin/phpmd src text phpmd.xml --exclude 'src/Symfony/Console/Command/*'
